content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) Recruitment 2026 notification released for 153 posts of Senior Residents. Candidates with DNB, MS/MD Can Apply Online. The Online application process for AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 has started on 30-06-2026 and will remain open until 14-07-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Raebareli website, aiimsrbl.edu.in.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Download
content_sections.text: The AIIMS Raebareli Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF has been released on 30-06-2026 at aiimsrbl.edu.in. Check the complete job details, vacancy, age limit, application fee, selection process and how to apply from the article. You can Check all Latest Sarkari Result Updates of All Central Government Jobs and State Government Jobs. AIIMS Raebareli Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF Name of the Post : AIIMS Raebareli Senior Residents Online Form 2026 Post Date : 01-07-2026 Total Vacancy : 153 Posts Brief Information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) has announced a notification for the recruitment of Senior Residents Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 Notification Overview
content_sections.text: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) has officially released a recruitment notification for Senior Residents. For all details regarding the recruitment process, eligibility, and application procedure, refer to the official notification. Eligible candidates can download it from the link below.

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: Application Fee For General/OBC/EWS Candidates: Rs. 1180 For SC/ST Candidates: Rs. 944 For PwBD Candidates : Exempted

AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 Important Dates Starting Date for Apply Online: 30-06-2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 14-07-2026 Date of Written examination: 22 July 2026 Date of Departmental Assessment: 23 July 2026
AIIMS Raebareli Recruitment 2026 Age Limit Maximum Age limit: 45 Years Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years OBC: 3 years OPH (General): up to 10 years OPH (OBC): up to 13 years OPH (SC/ST): up to 15 years

Eligibility Criteria Senior Resident (Non-Academic) : A medical qualification included in the first or second schedule or Part II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. Must be registered with the Central/State Medical Council. For Broad Speciality postgraduate degree i.e. MD /MS/ DNB in the specialty concerned or its equivalent. For Super speciality (SR Non Acad.), the essential qualification shall be MD/MS/DNB in related broad speciality or DM/M.Ch/DNB in concerned super speciality. PDF Courses : For PDF Courses in Super Speciality (PDF in Neurosurgery), M.Ch /DNB-SS shall be essential qualification. For Pathology Department: the essential qualification shall be MD pathology/MD Lab Medicine.
Salary Senior Resident/PDF: Pay Matrix (Level-11) with a minimum of Rs.67,700/- + NPA (for medical personnel).
AIIMS Raebareli Senior Residents Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online
